name: Quiche in a Noodle Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch pie plate with butter or margarine.
2. Prepare the noodles according to package directions; drain them.
3. Line the buttered pie plate with warm noodles.
4. Beat together the eggs and milk; stir in the cheeses and remaining ingredients.
5. Pour the mixture into the noodle crust.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes or until the center is set.
7. Serves 6 to 8.
